prompt:
Create a highly detailed spherical paper-sculpture cityscape diorama for Kaohsiung, shown as a floating circular island split into an upper hemisphere and an inverted mirrored lower hemisphere, on a deep black studio background with soft dramatic lighting. The model should look like layered cut paper, cardboard, miniature architectural maquette, and laser-cut craft pieces, with crisp edges, tactile paper texture, and realistic shadows. Between the two hemispheres, place one subtle but clearly readable city nameplate on the front rim, with the text 高雄 / Kaohsiung in dark lettering on a beige plaque.

Canvas and camera: square 1:1 composition, centered object, three-quarter frontal view, slightly elevated camera angle looking down at the upper city, with the inverted underside visible below like a reflection. Use shallow studio depth, high detail, no people as the main subject.

Upper hemisphere details: a circular blue waterfront base made from many layered paper wave pieces around the edge. Build a compact Kaohsiung-inspired skyline with exactly 1 very tall teal skyscraper in the center back resembling 85 Sky Tower, marked with a small “85” near the top. Add exactly 2 ornate temple pagodas in the left-middle foreground, each with stacked golden-orange roofs and red accents. Add exactly 2 festival creatures in front of the pagodas: 1 green dragon head/body and 1 orange tiger head/body. Add exactly 1 large modern stadium or cultural center on the right-middle foreground, with a white angular roof and a geometric dome made of triangular lattice panels. Add many small rectangular paper skyscrapers behind and around these landmarks, in muted beige, gray, teal, blue, and cream.

Transportation and waterfront objects: include exactly 2 light-rail trains, one crossing the front-left curved track and one on the right elevated curved track. Include exactly 1 cargo ship at the left front waterfront with containers and cranes nearby. Include exactly 1 white passenger ferry at the front center. Include exactly 1 small white car on the front road. Include exactly 2 scooters on the front road, colored red and teal/blue. Include exactly 1 small sailboat on the right water and exactly 1 white lighthouse with red top on a tiny island at the far right.

Background scenery: behind the skyline, add layered green paper hills, exactly 2 simple white paper clouds, and exactly 3 white flying bird silhouettes. Add palm trees and small street trees throughout the roads and waterfront.

Lower hemisphere: create an inverted underside directly beneath the circular island, mirroring the upper city elements downward like a hanging paper city reflection, including upside-down building facades, pagodas, train segments, cranes, and the tall teal tower. The underside should be darker and slightly shadowed but still detailed.

Visual style: premium GPT-image photorealistic paper craft, intricate miniature city model, crisp laser-cut layers, realistic paper grain, warm highlights, teal-blue water, muted urban palette, black background, soft vignette, museum-display quality. Avoid extra labels, avoid watermarks, avoid blurry text, and keep the city nameplate unobtrusive but legible.
